versions.version_description: Revised the other version of this song on the site and made some corrections. Also included the chords for the full song.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: When A Man Loves A Woman

content:
Name: Loren Canta

Tabs: Back Here
by BBmak

CD Verson

Cappo 1

Recommended Chords:
Chord......eadgbE
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]........022033
Csus2sus4..x32033[/tab]
[ch]D[/ch]..........xx0323
[ch]Am7[/ch]........x02010 

[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]             Csus2sus4 
Baby set me free from this misery[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
I can't take it no more [/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                Csus2sus4
Since you went away nothing's been the same [/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]
Don't know what I'm living for [/tab]
[tab]       Csus2sus4 [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]    
Here I am         so alone[/tab]
[tab]            Csus2sus4       [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
And there's nothing in this world I can do [/tab]

Chorus 
[tab]             Csus2sus4 [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Em7[/ch]   
Until you're back here baby [/tab]
[tab]Csus2sus4  [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em7[/ch]
Miss you   want you need you so [/tab]
[tab]             Csus2sus4 [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Until you're back here baby yeah [/tab]
[tab]          Csus2sus4   [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]Em7[/ch]
There's a feeling   inside I want you to know [/tab]
[tab]Csus2sus4   [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
You are the one and I can't let you go [/tab]


So I told you lies even made you cry 
Baby I was so wrong 
Girl I promise you now my love is true 
This is where my heart belongs 
Cos here I am so alone
And there's nothing in this world I can do 


Chorus 

[tab]      [ch]Am7[/ch]            [ch]Em7[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch] 
And I wonder are you thinking of me 'cause I'm thinking of you[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am7[/ch]            [ch]Em7[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
and I wonder are you ever coming back in my life[/tab]
[tab]              Csus2sus4 [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Em7[/ch]
'cause Here I am        so alone [/tab]
[tab]            Csus2sus4       [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
And there's nothing in this world I can do [/tab]

Chorus reepeat and fade away

*****************************************************************
This song was tab directly from the bbmak concert.
If their is any problems with the chords
Email me at klcanta@yahoo.com
you shouldn't have any problems.

Keep on playing.
